features: Context-usage bar: a slim bar along the bottom of every session item that fills and shifts from green to amber to red as its context window fills — on the sidebar and the needs-you board.
Configurable terminal font: pick any installed monospace font and size for the terminal in Settings, applied live. Only fonts that will actually render are offered, with a live preview.
The post-update summary now only appears in installed builds, not when running from source.
Automatic updates: the app checks on launch and once a day, shows an update window with per-release notes and the full changelog, and can install now or on quit.
The window now remembers its position and size across restarts.
Added Settings and Check for Updates to the app menu, plus a Check for updates link in the About window.
After an update installs, a one-time summary shows what changed in the new version.
Usage readouts now show rounded percentages instead of long floating-point values.
Fixed a spawned child inheriting a category from its folder instead of from its edge to the parent.
Fixed the subagent fleet panel clipping its contents in a docked layout.
Keep the Uncategorized rail entry always visible so it stops flickering.
Modals now scroll internally instead of overflowing a small or non-fullscreen window.
Usage readouts: live context-window percentage plus 5-hour and 7-day rate-limit meters.
